# remnawave_infra_provider (Resource)

Manages a Remnawave infrastructure provider (for infra billing).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "remnawave_infra_provider" "example" {
  name         = "Provider Co"
  favicon_link = "https://example.com/favicon.ico"
  login_url    = "https://billing.example.com/login"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Provider name (2-30 chars).

### Optional

- `favicon_link` (String) Favicon URL.
- `login_url` (String) Login URL.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String)
